rationale.R1.6: The agent's revisions demonstrate a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no loss of meaning, improving clarity and conciseness.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents all information as equally confident without flagging uncertainty for any claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output adheres strictly to the original scope without introducing new topics or drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced; the output maintains factual accuracy.
rationale.RX.5: While major edits are noted, minor changes lack traceability, falling short of full annotation.
